def negative_data_pipeline_no_error_handling():
    rule_id = "data_pipeline_no_error_handling"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Pipeline-style functions with no visible error handling or recovery path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
